src: Botright, the most advance undetected, fingerprint-changing, captcha-solving, open-source automation framework. Build on Playwright, its as easy to use as it is to extend your code. Solving your Captchas for free with AI.
ja: Playwright上に構築された、検出回避・フィンガープリント変更・キャプチャ解決機能を持つオープンソースの高度な自動化フレームワークBotright。AIで無料キャプチャ解決。
